title: Petface (Little Petface) Finlay Frog Plush Dog Toy with Built-In Squeaker, Lightweight Puppy Toy (Pack of 1)
features: LIGHTWEIGHT: This Little Petface Finlay Frog Plush Toy is lightweight, perfect for small dogs and puppies
BUILT-IN SQUEAKER: Keep your pup entertained with the built-in squeaker, ideal for active play and fetch games
FEATURES: Unique texture for chewing pleasure, great for toss, throw or cuddle sessions with your furry friend
PLAYTIME FUN: Encourage playtime and exercise with this fun toy that promotes interactive activities between pets and owners

TOY SAFETY: This toy is strong but not indestructible, and will eventually become susceptible to ‘chew’ damage, please supervise your pet with this toy, examine regularly for wear, and replace if any damage could be seen a health hazard
description: Product Description Leap into playtime with the Little Petface Finlay Frog Plush Dog Toy. Finlay has a unique texture that dogs love to chew, with a cute smiley face and a built-in squeaker for added fun. He's lightweight and easy to toss, perfect for games of fetch or cuddly downtime. The ideal toy to keep your pup entertained, active, and happy during playtime. Directions Not suitable for large dogs or strong chewers. It is the owners responsibility to decide if this product is suitable for their pet. Pets should be supervised when playing with toys. This toy is strong but not indestructible and will eventually become susceptible to chew damage. Examine regularly for wear and replace if any damage could represent a health hazard.
